content.en:
However, before talking about how to break the boundary, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor told some secrets.

"Ye Tian, your current physical body, chaotic divine power, and divine soul should be very close to your own limit, right? Once you reach this limit, it will be difficult for you to improve the slightest bit of strength in terms of essence and spirit, and then you can only try to condense the true spirit, and then use the power of the true spirit to fuse with the body, once the fusion is completed, it will be the true spirit realm. And the realm of the avenue is to condense a complete avenue, that is, a 100,000-meter avenue. But in fact, it is still necessary to merge the Great Dao with the soul. The true spirit and body are fused, the Great Dao is fused with the soul, and if you want to achieve Dao Ancestor, you must let the Great Dao merge with yourself, that is, with the spirit and spirit! The True Ancestor's spirit and spirit are integrated with the Great Dao, this is the real Dao Ancestor!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said.

"It turns out that the Achievement Dao Ancestor is like this!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He had always heard that merging with the Dao could become a Dao Ancestor, that is, merging with the Great Dao, but he didn't actually understand what it meant to be fused.

In fact, not only Ye Tian didn't know very well, but the other Heavenly Monarchs and even the True Monarch didn't know very well, everyone was vague and didn't understand the secrets of the Dao Ancestor's level.

It doesn't matter to everyone, after all, it's too far away from Dao Ancestor, and unless you reach the peak of True Ancestor, you will think about this secret, otherwise it's useless to know it in advance.

Even many Heavenly Monarchs even had misunderstandings about the Dao of Merge, and Ye Tian almost thought crookedly before, thinking that the Dao of Merger was the unity of the Dao and the body.

Who knew that the true path of harmony was the unity of the Great Dao and the spirit and spirit, and the True Ancestor needed the initial fusion of the Great Dao and the soul.

At this time, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor preached again: "The Great Dao and the Spirit are one, and from then on, he is the embodiment of the Great Dao. The Dao Ancestor who relies on himself to join the Tao has infinite possibilities, while the Dao Ancestor who uses the ancestral monument to join the Tao cannot reach the level of perfect harmony. Regarding this, I have mentioned it to you before, but I didn't say it in such detail. But how difficult it is to unite the spirit and spirit with the Great Dao!And the Void Heaven Dao Body is an attempt of mine, you should have found that the Void Heaven Dao Body can drive the progress of the physical body, divine power, and divine soul at the same time, but the focus is on the physical body. According to my ideal, the Void Heaven Dao Body should be able to fully evolve the three aspects of Essence, Qi and Spirit, but the realm of being a teacher is limited, and it is impossible to create the most perfect Void Heaven Dao Body. Otherwise, when the Void Heaven Dao Body is perfect, your essence and spirit can merge on their own, forming a new force, and as long as you reach the peak of the True Ancestor, you can easily fuse the Great Dao and step into the Dao Ancestor realm. "

"Master, in fact, there is no trace of flawed exercises, the Void Heaven Dao Body is already very powerful!"

Ye Tian hurriedly said.

"Yes, although the Void Heaven Dao Body is not perfect, it can still give you a great chance to merge with the Dao on your own. However, you are now cursed by the curse of the demon's ban, if you can't break the curse, you won't be able to promote the True Monarch, let alone the True Ancestor. And the way to break the boundaries and break the curse is to unite the spirit and spirit!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said solemnly.

"What, the unity of spirit and spirit?" Ye Tian was shocked, "Master, I am only in the Heavenly Destiny Realm!"

"That's right, the unity of essence and spirit is indeed a necessary process from the true ancestor to the Dao ancestor, and it is not something that can be achieved in the realm of the Mandate of Heaven, and even we, the Dao Ancestors, are not perfect in the unity of the spirit and spirit, but just forcibly unification the Great Dao and the spirit and spirit with the help of the ancestral monument. But the unity of essence and spirit is indeed achievable, which is calculated by the joint efforts of many Dao ancestors, and even some Dao ancestors have completed the unity of essence and spirit in the realm of true ancestors, but no heavenly monarch has ever been able to unite spirit and spirit. If you can unite your spirit and spirit in the Heavenly Monarch Realm, it can be regarded as breaking the boundary, and the Demon Forbidden Spell will not be able to work on you!"

"It's too hard!"

Ye Tian also had no confidence.

In the entire chaos, no one can unite the spirit and spirit at the level of the Heavenly Monarch, can he do it?

"No way, this is your only path!" Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said helplessly: "If you don't take this path, you will stay at the Heavenly Monarch level for the rest of your life, and even if you are reincarnated, you will be plagued by this curse." "

"Master, the disciple is willing to try the unity of spirit and spirit!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Okay, as a teacher, I'll tell you some tips for the unity of spirit and spirit!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor smiled.

Looking at the smile of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, Ye Tian even wondered if he was becoming a test subject of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor!

Of course, he also knew that Shizun was not harming him, but wanted to verify the unity of essence and spirit, if he could unite spirit and spirit, maybe he would have some inspiration for the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

At the level of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, it is too difficult to take another step forward, if you can understand the mystery of the unity of essence and spirit, you may be able to take another step at the level of the Dao Ancestor.

In the following days, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor had been guiding Ye Tian on the mysteries of the unity of essence and spirit.

This kind of treatment is unimaginable to other disciples, and it can be said to be a great opportunity!

Under the guidance of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, Ye Tian's strength had not improved much, but his principles and perceptions of cultivation had improved at a very terrifying pace.

Moreover, under the guidance of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, Ye Tian gradually had a general direction for the unity of essence and spirit.

First of all, he must reach the limit of his current realm, that is, the physical body, divine power, and divine soul have all reached the limit of the Heavenly Monarch, and there is no way to advance.

In the second step, he needs to create three Origin Divine Powers, the Origin Divine Power based on the physical body, the Origin Divine Power based on divine power, and the Origin Divine Power based on the soul.

Once the three Origin Divine Powers are complete, they can make the Spirit and Spirit reach an unimaginable increase, and even break the boundary in half a step.

The third step is to fuse the three Origin Divine Powers into a new Origin Divine Power, and this Origin Divine Power will also become his innate Origin Divine Power.

The moment the innate origin divine power is successful, his essence and spirit will be perfectly united.

At that time, he will break the curse of the demon's ban, and he will also successfully condense the true spirit, and it will be a powerful true spirit that surpasses the supreme true spirit.

According to the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, the Ten Star Gods will have the condensed Supreme True Spirit, and the Supreme True Spirit is the limit.

But once Ye Tian's plan is successful, a true spirit will be born that surpasses the supreme true spirit.

Although Ye Tian hadn't even completed the beginning of the plan now, he gave this true spirit a name - Chaos True Spirit!

In short, come up with a name first, and that's the motivation!

After the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor finished guiding Ye Tian, he left the Great Universe and no longer cared about it.

If Ye Tian succeeds, he will gain an apprentice who defy the sky, if Ye Tian fails, then he will just lose a genius disciple, although it will be a pity, but there is no way to do it.
